creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
- a 30,000 line long pkg-plist is not going to fly, it's way too long.
- everything from line 30093 on starting with "@dir" is wrong.  @dir isn't use for every directory, it's hardly used at all
- using PORTEXAMPLES=* would say another 2500 lines but that's still not enough


This port has to have it's plist autogenerated I think.  This pkg-plist is too long to be practical (nearly 3MB!)
